slides.title: Turn any idea into a scroll-stopping carousel
slides.subtitle: An animated, on-brand Instagram carousel — hosted by your own avatar.

slides.title: Give it a topic + a keyword
slides.body: You bring the idea and the comment keyword. The studio drafts the outline.

slides.title: One idea per slide
slides.body: Cover, a few content slides, and a CTA — each with a single, clear point.

slides.label: of every frame should be filled
slides.body: No dead white space. The avatar hosts the slide — never just decoration.

slides.title: Render each slide to its own MP4
slides.body: Headless Chrome screenshots every frame; ffmpeg encodes native 1080×1350.

slides.title: Want the full build?
slides.body: Comment the keyword and I'll send you the repo.
